case_title: CHARLES COLLINS VS. RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

NOTICE OF MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS PURSUANT TO CIVIL PROCEDURES 1094.5, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER COLLINS, CHARLES HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-05-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CHARLES COLLINS' NOTICE OF MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS PURSUANT TO CIVIL PROCEDURES 1094.5. IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, COURT REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR # 11216.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Civil Procedures 1094.5
Off Calendar Jul-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael S. Hebel, Esq., SFPOA, 415-861-0211, for Petitioner and moving party
Nancy J. Tavernit, DCA, Office of the City Attorney, 415-554-3961, for respondent and opposing party

JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE.
After the hearing, the Court rules as follows:
PETITIONER CHARLES COLLINS' Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Pursuant To Civil Procedures 1094.5. is Denied. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR # 11216. (301/PJB)
